allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('details'\), indent=2\)\); print\('fees:', json.dumps\(d.get\('fees'\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); e=d.get\('estimate',{}\); print\('toAmount:', e.get\('toAmount'\)\); print\('toAmountMin:', e.get\('toAmountMin'\)\); print\('duration:', e.get\('executionDuration'\)\); print\('fees:', sum\(float\(x.get\('amountUSD',0\)\) for x in e.get\('feeCosts',[]\)+e.get\('gasCosts',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); co=d.get\('details',{}\).get\('currencyOut',{}\); print\('amount:', co.get\('amount'\)\); print\('min:', co.get\('minimumAmount'\)\); print\('error:', d.get\('message','none'\)\)")
